_about: Self-docs golden set — anchored to THIS repo's manifest (repo key 'docsync'), so it is runnable in CI via `docsync eval --docs-repo . --mode map`. Cases are real: each base..head is a code range docsync actually synced on `main`, and expected_pages are the docs/* pages the corresponding `docs: sync` commit really edited (the EDIT-stage ground truth; docs_root='docs' is stripped). map-mode anchor mapping must COVER every edited page (recall=1.0 today) — map-mode precision is intentionally low (it over-selects; see eval.py), so gate recall, not precision. Grow with narrower, single-file cases to also exercise precision in full mode.

cases.label: structural-additive anchors + lazy-senior perf pass (real `docs: sync` c6b6435)
